examples: The name "Supersonics" honors Seattle's contribution to the jet age.
The Seattle Supersonics' Kevin Durant returned to the No. 1 position.
The name "Supersonics" honors Seattle "s contribution to the jet age."
To fans, the deal restores the cosmic order of a basketball universe disturbed when the original SuperSonics decamped.
Seattleites are no doubt looking forward to cheering for the SuperSonics this fall.
